Name: Give the money back
Notes: The Gobbler appears randomly (3% chance after 10 seconds into the wave)

Name: Ew, what's that smell?!
Challenge: Win a run in Danger 3 or more
Notes: System, allows you to banish 8 items from the shop per run

Name: Let's try this wave again
Challenge: During the last 5 seconds of a wave after wave 2, press 'Return to Main Menu'. Then press 'Resume' to try the wave again.

Name: Trick or Treat?
Challenge: Win a run without locking any items in the shop.
Notes: Playing as a character like Gangster who can't lock items will make this simple. Lower difficulty levels also work.

Name: Mmm, so juicy!
Challenge: Collect 100 fruits while at maximum health
Notes: Characters who benefit from fruit at max health like Glutton or Farmer may get this achievement passively. Also consider Penguin.

Name: Smells like something's burning?
Challenge: Kill 30 enemies by burning them in a single wave
Notes: A fire-focused Mage build should pick this up easily. Alternatively, as this seems to count enemies who died while on fire, any character with a Scared Sausage and lots of damage should do it.

Name: Crit Happens
Notes: This is easiest to achieve in Endless mode by going for Crit Chance upgrades after you have a build going, as 100% Crit Chance is much higher than you'd normally aim for in a game.
